rationale: The proposed change concerns the Tax Code homestead exemption amount. Educ. Code §38.157 governs student-athlete return-to-play protocols after concussions. The two provisions address entirely unrelated subjects and share no operative dependency.
quote: Sec. 38.157. RETURN TO PLAY IN PRACTICE OR COMPETITION.
_note: No relationship between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this concussion return-to-play statute.
